requirement_topic.en: Transport Safety — UN 38.3 and Dangerous Goods Class 9 (Lithium Batteries) into South Korea
requirement_topic.zh: 运输安全——UN 38.3及第9类危险货物（锂电池）进入韩国
requirement_topic.zht: 運輸安全——UN 38.3及第9類危險貨物（鋰電池）進入韓國

summary.en: Lithium batteries (cells, battery packs, and power banks) are classified as dangerous goods for transport purposes when shipped to South Korea. For air transport, IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR) and ICAO Technical Instructions apply; lithium-ion cells are UN 3480, batteries packed with or in equipment are UN 3481. For sea transport into the main Korean ports of Busan and Incheon, the IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) classifies lithium batteries as Class 9 (miscellaneous dangerous goods). Korean domestic carriage is governed by the Dangerous Goods Safety Management Act and related transport regulations, broadly aligned with the UN Model Regulations. All lithium batteries — regardless of origin — must have a valid UN 38.3 test report (UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3: Lithium Metal and Lithium-Ion Batteries) before transport. The UN 38.3 test covers altitude simulation, thermal test, vibration, shock, external short-circuit, impact/crush, overcharge, and forced discharge.
summary.zh: 锂电池（电芯、电池组及移动电源）在运往韩国时被归类为危险货物。空运须遵守IATA危险品规则（DGR）及ICAO技术细则；锂离子电芯为UN 3480，随附设备包装或装入设备中的电池为UN 3481。海运至韩国主要港口釜山及仁川时，IMDG规则（国际海运危险货物规则）将锂电池归为第9类（杂类危险品）。韩国国内运输受《危险物安全管理法》及相关运输法规约束，大体与联合国示范条例一致。所有锂电池——无论产地——在运输前须持有有效的UN 38.3测试报告（联合国危险货物运输试验和标准手册第三部分第38.3节：金属锂及锂离子电池）。UN 38.3测试涵盖高度模拟、热测试、振动、冲击、外部短路、撞击/挤压、过充及强制放电。
summary.zht: 鋰電池（電芯、電池組及行動電源）在運往韓國時被歸類為危險貨物。空運須遵守IATA危險品規則（DGR）及ICAO技術細則；鋰離子電芯為UN 3480，隨附設備包裝或裝入設備中的電池為UN 3481。海運至韓國主要港口釜山及仁川時，IMDG規則（國際海運危險品規則）將鋰電池歸為第9類（雜類危險品）。韓國國內運輸受《危險物安全管理法》及相關運輸法規約束，大體與聯合國示範條例一致。所有鋰電池——無論產地——在運輸前須持有有效的UN 38.3測試報告（聯合國危險品運輸試驗和標準手冊第三部分第38.3節：金屬鋰及鋰離子電池）。UN 38.3測試涵蓋高度模擬、熱測試、振動、衝擊、外部短路、撞擊/擠壓、過充及強制放電。

standards_or_laws: UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — Lithium Metal and Lithium-Ion Batteries (UN 38.3)
IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code), current edition — Class 9, UN 3480 / UN 3481 (sea transport into Busan / Incheon)
IATA Dangerous Goods Regulations (DGR), current edition — Section 3.9 (UN 3480 / UN 3481)
ICAO Technical Instructions for the Safe Transport of Dangerous Goods by Air (Doc 9284)
Dangerous Goods Safety Management Act (위험물안전관리법) — Republic of Korea domestic transport framework

summary.en: China requires UN 38.3 test reports for all lithium batteries transported by air, consistent with ICAO and CAAC (Civil Aviation Administration of China) requirements. For domestic road transport, GB 12268 (Dangerous Goods List) and JT/T 617 (Road Transport of Dangerous Goods) apply. For sea transport, IMDG Code (International Maritime Dangerous Goods Code) requirements apply globally. Chinese exporters shipping lithium batteries by air already typically obtain UN 38.3 test reports; however, the specific Korean import documentation, packaging marking verification on arrival, and any Korea-side dangerous-goods handling requirements at Busan / Incheon are additional obligations not mirrored in Chinese domestic transport rules.
summary.zh: 中国要求所有空运锂电池持有UN 38.3测试报告，符合ICAO及中国民用航空局（CAAC）要求。国内道路运输适用GB 12268（危险货物品名表）和JT/T 617（道路危险货物运输）。海运须遵守全球适用的IMDG规则（国际海运危险货物规则）。出口商通常已为空运锂电池取得UN 38.3测试报告；但韩国具体的进口文件、到货时的包装标识核验，以及釜山/仁川韩国方危险品处理要求属于额外义务，在中国国内运输规则中无对应镜像。
summary.zht: 中國要求所有空運鋰電池持有UN 38.3測試報告，符合ICAO及中國民用航空局（CAAC）要求。國內道路運輸適用GB 12268（危險貨物品名表）和JT/T 617（道路危險貨物運輸）。海運須遵守全球適用的IMDG規則（國際海運危險貨物規則）。出口商通常已為空運鋰電池取得UN 38.3測試報告；但韓國具體的進口文件、到貨時的包裝標識核驗，以及釜山/仁川韓國方危險品處理要求屬於額外義務，在中國國內運輸規則中無對應鏡像。

standards_or_laws: GB 12268-2012 — List of dangerous goods (SAC/SAMR) — domestic road transport classification
JT/T 617-2018 — Road transport of dangerous goods — requirements (Ministry of Transport, PRC)
CAAC Order No. 55 — Provisions on the Transport of Dangerous Goods by Civil Aviation (CAAC)

gap.en: UN 38.3 test reports are required globally (air and sea/road) and most Chinese exporters already hold them. The Korea-specific gap is import-side dangerous-goods compliance: for sea freight into Busan or Incheon, packages must carry UN 3480/3481 Class 9 markings and labels per the IMDG Code, the shipping documents must conform to IMDG declaration requirements, and consignors must ensure the Korean importer/forwarder can handle Class 9 cargo under the Dangerous Goods Safety Management Act. For air shipments into Korea, IATA DGR state-of-charge limits (30% maximum for loose lithium-ion cells shipped as cargo) must be observed. Exporters should confirm their UN 38.3 reports are from an accredited laboratory and cover the specific cell/pack configuration being exported, and that packaging meets the relevant packing instructions (e.g., PI 965 / PI 966 / PI 967 for air).
gap.zh: UN 38.3测试报告为全球性要求（空运及海运/陆运），大多数中国出口商已持有。韩国特有差距在于进口方危险品合规：海运至釜山或仁川时，包装须按IMDG规则粘贴UN 3480/3481第9类标识及标签，运输单据须符合IMDG申报要求，托运人须确保韩国进口商/货代能依据《危险物安全管理法》处理第9类货物。空运至韩国时，须遵守IATA DGR荷电状态限制（散装锂离子电芯作为货物运输时最高30%）。出口商应确认其UN 38.3报告来自认可实验室，且涵盖出口的具体电芯/电池组配置，并确保包装符合相关包装说明（如空运的PI 965/PI 966/PI 967）。
gap.zht: UN 38.3測試報告為全球性要求（空運及海運/陸運），大多數中國出口商已持有。韓國特有差距在於進口方危險品合規：海運至釜山或仁川時，包裝須按IMDG規則粘貼UN 3480/3481第9類標識及標籤，運輸單據須符合IMDG申報要求，託運人須確保韓國進口商/貨代能依據《危險物安全管理法》處理第9類貨物。空運至韓國時，須遵守IATA DGR荷電狀態限制（散裝鋰離子電芯作為貨物運輸時最高30%）。出口商應確認其UN 38.3報告來自認可實驗室，且涵蓋出口的具體電芯/電池組配置，並確保包裝符合相關包裝說明（如空運的PI 965/PI 966/PI 967）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — UN 38.3 test report required for all modes of transport (air, sea, road) globally; IMDG Code Class 9 compliance mandatory for sea transport into Busan / Incheon; IATA DGR state-of-charge limits mandatory for air cargo; Dangerous Goods Safety Management Act applies to Korean domestic carriage
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — UN 38.3 required by CAAC for air transport; GB 12268 / JT/T 617 for domestic road transport; IMDG Code for sea transport

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] UN 38.3 testing is a universal transport requirement — Chinese exporters shipping lithium batteries to South Korea must hold valid UN 38.3 test reports from accredited laboratories. Korea-specific additions: IMDG Code Class 9 documentation and marking for sea freight into Busan / Incheon, IATA DGR state-of-charge limits for air cargo, and Dangerous Goods Safety Management Act compliance on the Korean side. Most compliant Chinese exporters already meet UN 38.3; the gap is typically in IMDG declaration, packaging markings, and Korean import-side dangerous-goods handling.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] UN 38.3测试为全球性运输要求——向韩国出口锂电池的中国出口商须持有经认可实验室出具的有效UN 38.3测试报告。韩国特有要求：海运至釜山/仁川的IMDG规则第9类文件及标识、空运货物的IATA DGR荷电状态限制，以及韩国方的《危险物安全管理法》合规。合规的中国出口商通常已满足UN 38.3；差距通常体现在IMDG申报、包装标识及韩国进口方危险品处理方面。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] UN 38.3測試為全球性運輸要求——向韓國出口鋰電池的中國出口商須持有經認可實驗室出具的有效UN 38.3測試報告。韓國特有要求：海運至釜山/仁川的IMDG規則第9類文件及標識、空運貨物的IATA DGR荷電狀態限制，以及韓國方的《危險物安全管理法》合規。合規的中國出口商通常已滿足UN 38.3；差距通常體現在IMDG申報、包裝標識及韓國進口方危險品處理方面。

source.publisher: United Nations Economic Commission for Europe (UNECE) — Manual of Tests and Criteria (UN 38.3)
